title: SEC Proposes New Framework for Digital Asset Classification
summary: The SEC released a proposed rulemaking that would establish a clear taxonomy for digital assets, distinguishing between securities tokens, utility tokens, and decentralized protocol tokens. Industry groups have 90 days to comment.

title: EU MiCA Regulation Phase 2 Implementation Begins
summary: The second phase of the Markets in Crypto-Assets regulation takes effect across EU member states, requiring all crypto-asset service providers to obtain authorization and comply with enhanced consumer protection standards.

title: Japan FSA Updates Crypto Exchange Licensing Requirements
summary: Japan's Financial Services Agency announced revised licensing criteria for crypto exchanges, mandating enhanced cold storage requirements and quarterly third-party audits of reserve assets.

title: CFTC Enforcement Action Against Unregistered DeFi Protocol
summary: The CFTC filed charges against operators of a decentralized derivatives protocol for offering unregistered futures contracts to US persons, marking the agency's most aggressive action against DeFi to date.

title: Bank of England Publishes Digital Pound Consultation Response
summary: The Bank of England published its response to the digital pound consultation, signaling a cautious approach with a proposed pilot program limited to wholesale interbank settlements in 2027.

title: Singapore MAS Tightens Stablecoin Regulatory Framework
summary: The Monetary Authority of Singapore introduced new requirements for stablecoin issuers, including mandatory 1:1 reserve backing with sovereign bonds and real-time attestation by approved auditors.

title: US House Financial Services Committee Advances Stablecoin Bill
summary: The House Financial Services Committee voted 32-17 to advance the Payment Stablecoins Act, which would establish a federal licensing framework for stablecoin issuers and require monthly reserve disclosures.

title: FATF Updates Travel Rule Guidance for Virtual Assets
summary: The Financial Action Task Force released updated guidance on the travel rule for virtual asset transfers, lowering the threshold from $1,000 to $500 and extending requirements to cover DeFi protocols and unhosted wallets.

title: South Korea National Assembly Passes Crypto Investor Protection Act
summary: South Korea's National Assembly passed comprehensive legislation requiring exchanges to segregate customer assets, maintain insurance funds, and implement circuit breakers for volatile token trading.

title: ECB Signals Timeline for Digital Euro Pilot Program
summary: ECB President announced a Q3 2026 launch date for the digital euro pilot, involving five major eurozone banks and limited to person-to-person payments up to €500 per transaction.
